listParameters.prompt: required text prompt; Debrute forwards as request message text
listParameters.image: 0..9 input images; JPEG/JPG/PNG without alpha/BMP/WEBP; width and height 240..8000; aspect ratio 1:8..8:1; file size <=20MB
listParameters.size: 1K|2K or explicit pixels with total pixels 768*768..2048*2048 and aspect ratio 1:8..8:1
listParameters.n: 1..4 when group mode is disabled; 1..12 maximum generated count when group mode is enabled
listParameters.thinking_mode: boolean; applies when group mode is disabled and there is no image input
listParameters.bbox_list: optional bounding boxes; list length must match input image count

video.summary: Volcengine Ark Doubao Seedance 2.0 video generation.
video.chooseWhen: highest Seedance 2.0 quality, 1080p output, multimodal reference generation, generated audio
video.avoidWhen: you need the fastest or cheapest Seedance path

listParameters.references: project file path, http(s) URL, asset:// URL, or data URL references; media type inferred when possible
listParameters.duration: Seedance-supported duration range from official docs

intent.description: High-level Debrute video intent. Debrute derives Seedance content routing internally.

video.usageNotes: Use Debrute-native prompt, intent, and references arguments. Debrute builds the official Volcengine Ark content array internally. Project-local image references are encoded as supported image data URLs. Project-local audio references are encoded as supported audio data URLs. Project-local video references require a Debrute upload service; http(s) and asset:// video references pass through. `service_tier: flex` is not supported for the Seedance 2.0 series.

arguments.prompt: A quiet product launch video with slow camera movement and synchronized ambient audio.

intent.description: High-level Debrute video intent. Debrute derives Seedance content routing internally.

video.usageNotes: Use Debrute-native prompt, intent, and references arguments. Debrute builds the official Volcengine Ark content array internally. Project-local image references are encoded as supported image data URLs. Project-local audio references are encoded as supported audio data URLs. Project-local video references require a Debrute upload service; http(s) and asset:// video references pass through. `service_tier: flex` is not supported for the Seedance 2.0 series.
